programs.title: How It's Made: Dream Cars 3
programs.desc: The hosts of the series take viewers on a trip to the fascinating world of the automotive industry.They will show how the cars that many drivers dream of were created.They will visit the birthplaces of unique cars.

programs.title: How Do They Do It? 11
programs.desc: Documentary filmmakers reveal the secrets of the production of objects and devices.They meet inventive engineers and designers whose life mission is to improve reality.

programs.title: Truth Behind the Moon Landing
programs.desc: The moon landing is still the subject of many conspiracy theories.Some even believe it never happened.The program tries to answer the question whether the event could have been a fake.

programs.title: Truth Behind the Moon Landing

programs.title: NASA's Unexplained Files 3
programs.desc: NASA cameras have so far recorded countless mysterious objects in space.Documentarians will thoroughly analyze the most difficult to explain peculiarities observed by astronauts in space.Outstanding scientists and astronauts will express their opinions about them.Viewers will see interesting footage.They will find out whether science can explain these mysterious phenomena and how likely it is that NASA cameras captured traces of extraterrestrial life.
